description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build All that can be triggered manually. It sets up environment variables to allow unsecure commands, opt out of .NET CLI telemetry, and set Node.js version to 20. The workflow has multiple jobs to build and test different Node.js versions (16, 18, 20, 22, 23) on a Windows 2022 environment. Each build job checks out the code and uses a custom action to build Node.js with the specified version. Each test job depends on a build job, checks out the code, and uses a custom action to test the build with the specified Node.js version.
